summary: Iteration 52: Design Refinement Pass - All visual improvements verified. Login works, TapPage/TablePage/KitchenPage load correctly with refined neutral palette. Z-index fix confirmed (dropdowns at z-index 9999 appear above item cards). Category colors (amber/pink/orange etc.) working. Price typography is neutral white (not purple). 'Item details' text label appears on hover. Customize modal opens correctly. Kitchen kanban has operational status colors (amber=NEW, blue=PREP, green=READY).
critical_code_review_comments: Z-index fix implemented correctly: barman-dropdown and server-dropdown both use inline style={{ zIndex: 9999 }}
Category color CSS variables (--cat-bg, --cat-fg, --cat-border) properly defined in index.css with dark mode overrides
Item tiles use activeCat.color for accent stripe and activeCat.css for hover states
'Item details' button appears on hover with pencil icon via group-hover:opacity-100 transition
Kitchen status badges use operational colors: amber-500 (NEW), blue-500 (PREP), emerald-500 (READY), red-500 (LATE)

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend not tested (no backend changes)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Design refinement pass complete. All 9 fixes verified: 1) Z-index fix working (dropdowns appear ABOVE cards), 2) Neutral palette on operational screens, 3) Category colors (amber/pink/orange/etc.), 4) Clean layout with spacing, 5) 'Item details' edit action visible on hover, 6) Strong right order panel, 7) Clean kanban with spacing, 8) Dark typography for prices, 9) SPET identity with Toast-level usability.

tap_page.category_cocktails_pink: ✅ PASSED - Cocktails uses pink color (cat-cocktails class)
tap_page.category_switching: ✅ PASSED - Clicking categories updates title and items

tap_page.barman_dropdown_zindex: ✅ PASSED - Dropdown has z-index: 9999, appears ABOVE item cards
tap_page.tabs_list: ✅ PASSED - 14 tabs visible with names, tab numbers, totals
tap_page.order_panel: ✅ PASSED - Shows active tab with items, quantity, price
tap_page.item_details_button: ✅ PASSED - Shows 'Item details' text label on hover
tap_page.customize_modal: ✅ PASSED - Opens with Ingredients, Extras, Special Instructions

kitchen_page.loads_correctly: ✅ PASSED - KDS with clean kanban layout
kitchen_page.kanban_columns: ✅ PASSED - 5 columns: Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed
kitchen_page.status_badge_colors: ✅ PASSED - NEW=amber, PREP=blue, READY=green, DONE=gray, LATE=red
kitchen_page.kitchen_bar_toggle: ✅ PASSED - Toggle between Kitchen and Bar filters

table_page.category_sidebar: ✅ PASSED - Same category tabs as TAP page
table_page.table_selection: ✅ PASSED - Clicking table shows session detail

design_verification.z_index_fix: CONFIRMED - Both barman-dropdown and server-dropdown use style={{ zIndex: 9999 }}
design_verification.neutral_palette: CONFIRMED - Operational screens use neutral background/card colors, not heavy purple
design_verification.item_details_visible: CONFIRMED - Button shows 'Item details' text label (not just pencil icon)
design_verification.price_not_purple: CONFIRMED - Computed color is rgb(255,255,255) white, not purple
design_verification.kanban_operational_colors: CONFIRMED - Status badges use amber/blue/emerald/red operational colors
